form.formComment: Could only manage fifth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (22.90) over 390m at Ascot Park. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on March 30 over 295m at this track behind Impressive Nora beaten 0.7 lengths (17.19) in a Class 2. Key runner based on recent form.
